channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin drops toward $62,000 as the chip selloff deepens for a second day
item.description: A renewed rout in semiconductor stocks pulled risk assets lower again, and crypto kept sliding. Bitcoin is down 5% on the week, with ether and the memecoins falling harder.

item.title: Senate Dems urge probe into $500M crypto deal between Trumps, UAE
item.description: Democrats want the Senate to hold hearings on the dealings between the Trump administration, World Liberty Financial and Abu Dhabi royalty.

item.title: StarkWare introduces 'Private KYC' to address personal data breaches
item.description: “Identity checks today ask for your whole document when they only need one fact,” Starknet said.

item.title: Crypto PAC's $5.5 million Congress pick gets Maryland win, more crypto allies advance
item.description: The Fairshake super PAC supported Adrian Boafo in Maryland, plus other candidates in Maryland, New York and Utah as each ran its primary elections.

item.title: CFTC sues Kentucky after state’s prediction market lawsuits
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has sued Kentucky, now the ninth state the regulator is battling in its fight over prediction markets.

item.title: 🚨NEW: In a letter to administration officials, a group of four law enforcement organizations say they remain concerned about certain provisions in the Clarity Act, including Section 604 (the Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act), arguing it would create gaps in ov - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9ORmNuclpJQVlLN3R4TFh0aFRrV3d3S1lGc2NKeHR1cTY5ejE1dG5uMVpMaGs1SXVSeG9FMWVLTkhYU1IxcUdpcmxtekcwR0hSTl9oVmxwSlZDZDZ1N0VwZWtGcXlCdw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: In a letter to admini…

item.title: Ethereum’s much-hated staking 'tax' may already be obsolete
item.description: Ethereum’s latest “funding crisis” has triggered a fierce debate over whether to tax staking rewards or to pursue funding from large ETH holders for new organizations like EthLabs.

item.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras down 11% after first public earnings report
item.description: While revenue was up 92% from year-ago levels, the company forecasted a lower core gross margin next quarter.

item.title: $170M Ether longs liquidated as crypto market tumbles: Is ETH doomed?
item.description: ETH price hangs in the balance as a fresh wave of liquidations pressure the altcoin and spillover from Bitcoin’s struggles to hold $62,000 impact investor sentiment.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate to release crypto tax legislation as early as fall 2026. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBrZkEtQlhvc0pBSF83cExwX1dWSjY2SE9BU3JNTXdiZ1BySXZvNHFBSEFJMnBGMUlZLWpkUml5akZFUHBjYnliX01LY1lMdzJ1RDZxUGUwOU5raERCU1hiQU53?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate to release cr…

item.title: Meet Qwable: The Free Local Model That Thinks Like Claude Fable
item.description: Someone fine-tuned Fable 5's reasoning style into a local Qwen model. Then someone else removed its conscience.

item.title: Starmer steps down: What Andy Burnham means for crypto in the UK
item.description: Burnham brings a dose of optimism to the UK crypto industry, having previously supported the blockchain industry as mayor of Manchester.

item.title: Crypto critic Roubini joins tokenization boom with onchain 'Technodollar'
item.description: The economist known as "Dr. Doom" is supporting a tokenized security backed by a Nasdaq-listed ETF he oversees, designed to protect wealth in global crises.

item.title: Trump's Quantum Push Wins Praise, But Experts Warn Bitcoin Isn't Ready
item.description: Industry leaders welcomed President Trump's quantum executive orders, while researchers said the accelerated timelines reflect growing urgency around post-quantum security and cryptocurrency infrastructure.

item.title: Crypto’s Clarity Act Has a New Enemy: Catholic Leaders
item.description: A group of 82 Catholic leaders warned a key provision of the crypto bill, protecting software developers from prosecution, could enable human trafficking.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg ordered Meta staff to develop moneyless prediction market: NYT
item.description: The Meta CEO reportedly plans for the company to launch a prediction market independent of its other apps allowing users to place wagers using a points system rather than money.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg Wants a Prediction Market Too: NYT
item.description: The initiative follows bets on stablecoins and the metaverse.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto isn't the problem with the US economy, says senator
item.description: Louisiana Senator John Kennedy largely dismissed what he called the “promotion” of cryptocurrency by the Digital Chamber CEO Cody Carbone in a Senate hearing on affordability.

item.title: Multi-year Bitcoin holder selling falls to 19-month low as halving model flags new market bottom date
item.description: OG Bitcoin holders' spending dropped to a 19-month low, as market cycle indicators point to September as a potential market bottom.

item.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Cyber AI Beats Anthropic's Banned Mythos Model—And Nobody's Shutting It Down
item.description: GPT-5.5-Cyber tops the CyberGym leaderboard as Anthropic's best models sit offline under a Trump administration export ban.

item.title: The Ethereum Foundation’s ETH holdings are at their lowest dollar-value in almost 6 years. Is the Ethereum Foundation running out of money? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5aLVg1N2ZZOTgyaHVMMGtSS2NyanVLSXZOQzV3Qk9uME9uZUZGdmI4ZFdyRjNjODFOSWZmbTVLZGZFLTV2dXk1cHl4QUs1SDRETGJrdF91VnJCeFk?oc=5" target="_blank">The Ethereum Foundation’s ETH holdings are …

item.title: AI Agent Triggers Nuclear Strike After Getting Outmaneuvered in Civilization VI
item.description: A new benchmark designed to test strategic reasoning found an AI-controlled empire spent 50 turns developing nuclear weapons to stop a rival's cultural victory—only to lose the game anyway.

item.title: Arthur Hayes: Bitcoin's Bottom Is Probably Around $40,000 On June 12, 2026, during an interview with @elliotrades, BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes @CryptoHayes shared his prediction for Bitcoin's bottom. When asked about the ultimate bottoming price and - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5Yc1RyeUtGbEw2elZ2RXF5MElCYmYteXhmcFRrN0pWdjlOcE9kaFZSbGNUSlNqRTBQRmQ4YkFtNWdjZUVaaGFVdHVGdXFTSWRxZGlKZWRuczVJQzZlNndFRkRDNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Arthur Hayes: Bitcoin's Bottom I…

item.title: Zcash miner Fortitude gets Nasdaq listing via HeartSciences merger
item.description: The all-stock deal gives Fortitude a Nasdaq listing while HeartSciences retains its healthcare business and existing shareholders keep a minority stake.

item.title: Meta is developing a prediction market app called ‘Arena’ as sector booms: NYT
item.description: The app would let users forecast future events using a points-based system rather than cash wagers, the report said, citing people familiar with the matter.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US House Committee schedules crypto Clarity Act hearing for July 17. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBZRk9hUnJIamh4SDYwVm5hSnp3TjZNMHBsMERrVkJuTFpjeWptWjlvTHYtV2lsby1SQklEYml1VnBWRldMYTJTQVg1U2FxaXR4SkpnMHZGX2pEOGlOaWNoWU5R?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US House Committee s…

item.title: A New OpenClaw Competitor: ToqanClaw Promises Privacy in AI Agent Race
item.description: Prosus launched ToqanClaw, a no-code AI platform positioned as an European alternative to AI agents like OpenClaw.

item.title: CFTC chair says perp trading not suitable for all assets it regulates
item.description: Michael Selig told US cotton producers that the agency’s regulatory approach to crypto perpetual futures may not be a “natural fit for traditional commodity markets, like agriculture.”

item.title: JUST IN: Crypto prediction platform Polymarket unveils Fifa World Cup commercial. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1mbGdZekU3UlU0UzhSNTdTN1c5LTdDWTB2bi1yd0FtOGdXMk5GZUd6eXhuNGlMbHB4SUtTYVQ2TGhZeGZlQmdlU1YwSVhqNWNhNlpTU1N5S1F2TjFKVHNRUVRn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Crypto prediction platfor…

item.title: BNY sees 'FOMO' driving asset managers into tokenized funds
item.description: Fund issuers are exploring blockchain-based ETFs amid fears of missing an early foothold in tokenized finance.

item.title: CBOE weighs converting BTC, ETH continuous futures into perpetual futures: Report
item.description: As US regulatory changes accelerate the adoption of crypto perpetual futures and rivals Coinbase and Kalshi expand their offerings, Cboe mulls a product overhaul.

item.title: ESMA CALLS ON UNAUTHORISED CRYPTO-ASSET SERVICE PROVIDERS TO WIND DOWN ORDERLY, AS MICA TRANSITIONAL PERIOD ENDS - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBoNnZyRW9RdlJLWlRHd0xBRGFjMHBXRmJPY25ZaVg2ZjF5bG1oclY2ZTJVSUtYUmJHdjI4dGVOQ050RHNvQ1B3V2M2R0RiUTFqbE5zMFotam1NaE5UR3c?oc=5" target="_blank">ESMA CALLS ON UNAUTHORISED CRYPTO-ASSET…

item.title: Bitcoin Tests Two-Week Low at $62K as Tech Stocks Waver on Wall Street
item.description: Investors are digesting a hawkish Fed, with risk-off sentiment driving a sell-off in AI and crypto

item.title: Chainlink joins European and Korean bank consortia to develop FX settlement network
item.description: Banks across Europe and South Korea will study whether regulated euro and won stablecoins can enable real-time cross-border foreign exchange settlement.

item.title: Chainlink teams up with 47 South Korean, European banks to speed up international money transfers
item.description: The alliance, called Project Pangea, plans to use stablecoins to settle multimillion-dollar currency trades between Europe and South Korea in near real time.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Congress schedules a hearing for the Clarity Act on July 17 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5ramNqU1hhTWlPSFlwYmZoa2I0NUtmTmJuOTlFeDZZZ0IwNFotZ3BicGl4MUJzb0FRZ3lnLWlZZGIwMWE5NTNReTNZMUFRZHZiN0dZM0hwR0d0Qk1BWmtOSzRWbEdiUlk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Congress sche…

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Cuts 20% of Workforce in 'Leaner' Reorganization
item.description: The non-profit is cutting 54 jobs as it reorganizes into focused "clusters," following a succession of leadership departures.

item.title: Bitcoin teases $62K breakdown as analysis sees Micron earnings volatility next
item.description: Bitcoin stayed volatile while bulls tried to preserve support at local lows while stocks prepared for Micron forward earnings and digested Asia losses.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will cut budget 40% in major reset
item.description: The reduction comes on the same day the EF confirmed a 20% reduction in headcount and follows the resignation of co-Executive Director Hsiao-Wei Wang. Her departure brings the total number of senior Ethereum Foundation figures to leave sin…

item.title: Bitcoin's recent drop below $60,000 signals Fed, ETF and AI pressures: Deutsche Bank
item.description: Bitcoin's slump to its lowest level since late 2024 reflects a hawkish Federal Reserve, exchange-traded fund outflows and a shift of capital into AI, the bank said.

item.title: Bitcoin’s role in portfolios is evolving, and it could be considered a complementary diversifier. We believe a modest allocation (typically ~1–2%) could impact return potential in a portfolio while maintaining appropriate risk tolerance. Hear more from Michael Gat - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1fT2ZmcXpfQkRZei1EcjlpcEpqN2hGenpNZ0kzcl9leHlJRjFQWUk2RmhMc2x6QmtST1oyQkhMWHBvMzBER2Z6TTk1cW5OVlE0TlFLajQxTnVGeS1EczZN?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin’s role in portfolios is evolvi…

item.title: This year, the EF is decreasing its budget by roughly 40%, which entails some difficult decisions. The goal of the decreases was set out in the Treasury Management Policy last year: the EF is transitioning into being a long-term-oriented endowment-based orga - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5yUktGOWJlLXZuWnFza3hEU2lzY0doSlp5a1ZHVHBiTU02X0JkWFJVZEdMV1lkQzVuNFAyUWM0ejZiVE1MbXNWVXA0cEpmRHUtQXRuWnZnLTk0VndvNnl6TEFoT0NQUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">This year, the EF is decreas…

item.title: Bitcoin slump worsens amid SpaceX rout: Can BTC price hold $60K any longer?
item.description: SpaceX’s $600 billion wipeout rattles tech markets, putting Bitcoin’s $60,000 support at risk as traders brace for a deeper BTC selloff.

item.title: Why tokenized SpaceX shares broke before retail investors could buy them
item.description: Tokenized SpaceX shares drew more than $1 billion in demand, but many investors received refunds instead. What went wrong?

item.title: JUST IN: Ethereum Foundation fires 20% of its staff. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAxUG5fVkl1QlY3aVpPU0w1QmNxcERJOU16bGFKeE5oT3dEcWd2WFVoLVNTTEg2c1huSjB0d0dkR283WGZobm52Nm1CZ05iaXoydkY4c0l6Q1lmdU9fNWEtQzl3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Ethereum Foundation fires…

item.title: The SEC delayed tokenizing stocks, and here’s why that’s a relief
item.description: Before we rush to tokenize U.S. equities, we need compliance systems that understand context, not just checkboxes. Investors like Michael Burry see the danger, so should the rest of us, urges Chamarajnagar.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation cuts 20% of staff amid leadership exodus
item.description: The reduction follows a period of significant upheaval at the organization’s leadership level.

item.title: Thailand Expands Crypto Mining Probe Into $300M Chinese Laundering Network
item.description: Thailand's DSI says a Chinese "grey capital" network used illegal crypto mining and cash mules to launder more than $300 million a year.

item.title: 🚨 JUST IN: Ethereum Foundation announces a new structure, cutting roughly 20% of its workforce. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5nWFVhbGdtUFhvSnFHeENhU1ZreVZRVVZxRG8wczdJcVNILXU2YjdlcUk4WVMxREZieFRpaUJPOTBlS2NqUmFkcGZGN1B4b3NpZlphanA0cEY1TUJEbFl1RTRmVEE?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 JUST IN: Ethereum Foundation…

item.title: Bitcoin may need to plunge 15% or more to mark bottom, according to this long-time indicator
item.description: With bitcoin testing its 200 week moving average, on-chain data suggests the $50,000 to $54,000 range could become the next key battleground.

item.title: Former Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova joins stablecoin issuer Agora as head of operations
item.description: The former Robinhood Crypto executive will oversee operations as Agora scales its rapidly growing AUSD stablecoin business.

item.title: In Clarity Act's final weeks, its path through U.S. Senate not getting much clearer
item.description: Tough negotiations linger in several difficult arenas, but crypto's Washington lobbyists are flying in allies this week and still hoping for a July vote.

item.title: Kalshi adds India to growing list of restricted jurisdictions
item.description: Kalshi has added India to its list of 55 restricted jurisdictions, months after Indian authorities warned VPN providers to stop facilitating access to these platforms.

item.title: The ECB digital euro takes step forward after winning key European Parliament vote
item.description: EU lawmakers backed a legal framework to develop an ECB digital currency by 2029 so the continent can stop relying entirely on U.S. credit card and stablecoin giants.

item.title: Franklin Templeton closes 250 Digital acquisition deal and sets up new Franklin Crypto division
item.description: The $1.7 trillion asset manager did not disclose the amount paid for the acquisition of 250 Digital but revealed its plans for a new corporate division exclusively for crypto investments.

item.title: EU committee advances digital euro bill after key vote
item.description: EU lawmakers backed rules for an offline and online digital euro, with privacy safeguards, holding limits and no interest payments.

item.title: Morning Minute: Fomo's $75M Raise Shows Big VCs Are Still Betting on Consumer Crypto
item.description: Crypto majors are selling off as big Tech gets routed; Saylor is hoarding cash; and ETH heavyweights team up to fund R&D with ETHLabs.

item.title: Strategy's STRC slump prompts Terra comparisons that don't hold up, says analyst
item.description: Benchmark's Mark Palmer says the comparison misreads what STRC is — a dividend-paying share backed indirectly by bitcoin, not a peg waiting to break.

item.title: Former BIS chief softens stance on stablecoins, backs coexistence with fiat
item.description: Former BIS general manager Agustín Carstens said stablecoins can enhance financial inclusion and innovation but stressed the need for global regulatory frameworks to enable coexistence with fiat money.
